title: docs: regenerate APIDOCS.md
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Auto-generated from OpenAPI spec changes after a successful production deploy.

gist.headline: Fresh API Docs
gist.blurb: Our automated bots just polished up the API documentation to match the latest production release.
gist.summary: Automated sync of APIDOCS.md to reflect the latest OpenAPI specification changes from production.
gist.impact: Developers have access to the most up-to-date API documentation.
gist.visual_concept: The robot monitor character (representing the automated bot) printing out fresh documents while the bee mascot reads them.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head printing out fresh document pages, while the tiny bee mascot wearing reading glasses reads them happily. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm.
